_readme: Copy this file to 'checkpoints_local.json' (same folder) to add your own models to the picker. It is gitignored, so it stays private and Update.bat never touches it. Each model needs at least an id, a name, a filename (what it saves as in ComfyUI/models/checkpoints), and a url to download it from. Find models on Civitai or Hugging Face; use the direct download URL of the .safetensors file. size_mb is optional (shown on the Install button).

models.name: My Custom Model
models.best_for: What this model is good at, in a few plain words.
